name: Boxes and cutouts
short_description: Bad news: Noisebox, but no noise＞﹏＜ . Good news: The noise box can be deformed (~*▽ *) ~, all the gameplay becomes a beautiful clip art on the deformed box, (ps: cut art can be from your collection!) (❁´ v '❁))
detailed_description:
About NoiseBox.

Compared to the previous, the noise box has a big change in the gameplay, yes, it has nothing to do with noise

Unlike other placement games, the noise box seems to be less open, and the buildable area is concentrated in a small box, but this box can be deformed.This may make you feel a little different

Clip art

The game's Mycards file is stored under the game's construction materials, they (PNG pictures) after classification are placed in different subdirectories, you can customize, is to add some new pictures or delete some pictures




Search for '普朗克噪音工作室' on BliBli, send a private message or chat together in the video below.
about_the_game:
About NoiseBox.

Compared to the previous, the noise box has a big change in the gameplay, yes, it has nothing to do with noise

Unlike other placement games, the noise box seems to be less open, and the buildable area is concentrated in a small box, but this box can be deformed.This may make you feel a little different

Clip art

The game's Mycards file is stored under the game's construction materials, they (PNG pictures) after classification are placed in different subdirectories, you can customize, is to add some new pictures or delete some pictures
